# Spell Definition Template

- Id: stable string key
- DisplayName: localized key
- SpellSchool: enum
- SlotCategory: enum
- CooldownSeconds: float
- Charges: integer optional
- ResourceCost: float
- CastTime: float
- AimMode: Cursor | Self | Cone | Directional | Ground
- ProjectilePrefab: addressable reference
- ImpactVfxKey: string key
- CastAnimationKey: action key with directional mapping
- InterruptPolicy: enum
- UpgradePath: references
